items.title: Incremental computations for OCaml apps
items.oneliner: OCaml library that recomputes only changed dependencies, making spreadsheet-like UIs and dataflows fast without manual cache invalidation.

items.title: A programmable Bash enumerator
items.oneliner: Shell iterator that replaces brittle xargs and for loops with one consistent, NUL-safe command template for files, lines, ranges.

items.title: Ultra-fast Python interpreter tracing
items.oneliner: Deep implementation walkthrough for Python 3.15 profiling mode that shows how low-overhead tracing works inside the interpreter.

items.title: Packing ternary weights into bytes
items.oneliner: Practical bit-packing tutorial showing how to store five ternary weights in one byte with over 99 percent efficiency.

items.title: Local multimodal AI for Macs
items.oneliner: Open-source Mac app for running local text, image, and code models on Apple Silicon without cloud accounts.

items.title: Soft-body HTML form controls
items.oneliner: Dependency-free UI library with 40 physics-based native form controls, plus dark mode, RTL support, and WCAG AA accessibility.

items.title: A 3D indoor station map
items.oneliner: Three.js demo showing how to render multi-floor indoor geospatial data for complex pedestrian navigation in the browser.

items.title: An immersive Gaussian splat tour
items.oneliner: Interactive PlayCanvas scene that demonstrates Gaussian splat rendering for a navigable cultural heritage tour in the browser.

items.title: Running Doom on a custom CPU
items.oneliner: Detailed build log on designing a CPU, solving memory bottlenecks, and getting Doom to run in real time.

items.title: Build a local AI VS Code extension
items.oneliner: Hands-on tutorial for creating a VS Code chat extension backed by a local DeepSeek model through Ollama.
